name: Painting
tagline: McBull's studio. Commissions, mentors, the occasional open weekend.
cardBody: McBull's studio runs commissions, mentors, and the occasional open weekend. The gallery wall is rotated by the residents every quarter.
problem: Painting in Kenya outside Nairobi is studio-less. Painters work from bedrooms and back porches; their canvases dry on neighbours' walls; their pricing is set by tourist galleries that take half. There is no infrastructure for mid-career painters to take on apprentices, no public-facing wall they control, no studio they can lock at the end of the day.
approach: McBull's painting studio on the Downtown courtyard. Permanent dedicated space, year-round access, climate-controlled storage. Apprentices placed on six-month rotations. The gallery wall in the main room is curated by the painting residents every quarter and is the only one that explicitly sells.

programmes.name: Painting studio in residence
programmes.description: McBull's permanent studio in the courtyard. Dedicated space, storage, lights, ventilation. Open to the public on quarterly open-studio weekends.

programmes.name: Apprenticeship rotations
programmes.description: Two apprentices placed in the studio per six-month rotation. Stipend covered, daily access, mentor sessions weekly.

programmes.name: Gallery wall (sales)
programmes.description: The main-room wall is a working sales wall. Resident-curated rotation every quarter. Prices on the door. Gallery margin to the artist.

programmes.name: Open-weekend studio visits
programmes.description: Twice a year the studio opens to the public for one weekend. Demos, commissions discussed, work on the walls.

outcomes.target: Painting studio fully operational. First apprenticeship cohort placed. Four wall rotations completed.
Second wall opens (second gallery space). Apprenticeship doubled to four placements.
Permanent-collection acquisitions begin: Downtown buys one work per quarter from the wall.
Festival visual-week dedicated painting exhibition. Co-curated with [Partner: Nairobi gallery].
Permanent Downtown painting collection of [N] works on rotating public display.

fundingNeeds.label: Painting studio upgrade (ventilation, climate control, lighting rig)
Studio supplies and consumables (canvas, paint, primer)
